text.tspan: prisma-next db update → Update your database schema to match your contract
Trace output: deep internals, stack traces
│ Compares your database schema to the emitted contract and applies the necessary
│ changes. Works on any database, whether or not it has been initialized with `db init`.
│ Destructive operations prompt for confirmation in interactive mode. Use -y to
